ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cafeterias" (
  "cafeteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cafeteria */,
  "cafeteria_name" TEXT /* Name of the cafeteria */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the cafeteria */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cafeteria manager */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the cafeteria */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the cafeteria */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the cafeteria */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cafeteria_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cafeterias_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES cafeteria_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cafeteria_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cafeteria manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the cafeteria manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the cafeteria manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the cafeteria manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the manager's role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the manager's role (if applicable) */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consumption_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumption record */,
  "cafeteria_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cafeteria */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the record */,
  "coffee_consumed" INTEGER /* Amount of coffee consumed */,
  "milk_consumed" INTEGER /* Amount of milk consumed */,
  "in_out" TEXT /* Indicates if the record is for incoming or outgoing stock */,
  "balance" INTEGER /* Balance of stock after the record */,
  "shift" TEXT /* Shift of the consumption record (morning, afternoon, evening) */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who made the consumption */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the consumption record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumption_records_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumption_records_cafeteria_id FOREIGN KEY ("cafeteria_id") REFERENCES cafeterias ("cafeteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "cafeteria_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cafeteria */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee making the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, card, online) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID for the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_cafeteria_id FOREIGN KEY ("cafeteria_id") REFERENCES cafeterias ("cafeteria_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or job title of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee left the company (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "cafeteria_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cafeteria */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of item (coffee or milk) */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for when the item should be reordered */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "next_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of the next delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_cafeteria_id FOREIGN KEY ("cafeteria_id") REFERENCES cafeterias ("cafeteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restocking_records" (
  "restock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restocking record */,
  "cafeteria_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cafeteria */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of item (coffee or milk) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity restocked */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Date of restocking */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cafeteria manager who authorized the restocking */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the restocking */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date of the restocking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restocking_records_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES cafeteria_managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restocking_records_cafeteria_id FOREIGN KEY ("cafeteria_id") REFERENCES cafeterias ("cafeteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "cafeteria_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cafeteria */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "total_income" REAL /* Total income for the month */,
  "total_expenses" REAL /* Total expenses for the month */,
  "net_profit" REAL /* Net profit for the month */,
  "total_restock_cost" REAL /* Total cost of restocking for the month */,
  "total_consumed_value" REAL /* Total value of items consumed for the month */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the financial report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_cafeteria_id FOREIGN KEY ("cafeteria_id") REFERENCES cafeterias ("cafeteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget record */,
  "cafeteria_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cafeteria */,
  "budget_year" TEXT /* Year of the budget */,
  "allocated_budget" REAL /* Allocated budget for the year */,
  "remaining_budget" REAL /* Remaining budget for the year */,
  "allocated_restock_budget" REAL /* Allocated budget specifically for restocking */,
  "allocated_operational_budget" REAL /* Allocated budget for operational expenses */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the budget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_cafeteria_id FOREIGN KEY ("cafeteria_id") REFERENCES cafeterias ("cafeteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "cafeteria_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cafeteria */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., low stock, overdue payment, unusual consumption) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* Who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_cafeteria_id FOREIGN KEY ("cafeteria_id") REFERENCES cafeterias ("cafeteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions for the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
